pan-roasted-brined-pork-chop.name: Pan-roasted Brined Pork Chop

ingredients.prep: halved crosswise, plus 2 unpeeled cloves for basting

instructions: Bring 2 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Add kosher salt, sugar, juniper berries, peppercorns, halved head of garlic, and 1 thyme sprig; stir to dissolve salt and sugar. Transfer to a medium bowl and add 5 cups ice cubes. Stir until brine is cool. Add pork chop; cover and chill for at least 8 and up to 12 hours.

Preheat oven to 450°. Set a wire rack inside a rimmed baking sheet. Remove chop from brine; pat dry. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a large cast-iron or other oven-proof skillet. Cook chop until beginning to brown, 3-4 minutes. Turn and cook until second side is beginning to brown, about 2 minutes. Keep turning chop every 2 minutes until both sides are deep golden brown, 10-12 minutes total.

Transfer skillet to oven and roast chop, turning every 2 minutes to prevent it from browning too quickly, until an instant-read thermometer inserted horizontally into center of meat registers 135°, about 14 minutes. (Chop will continue to cook during basting and resting.)

Carefully drain fat from skillet and place over medium heat. Add butter, 2 unpeeled garlic cloves, and remaining thyme sprig; cook until butter is foamy. Carefully tip skillet and, using a large spoon, baste chop repeatedly with butter until butter is brown and smells nutty, 2-3 minutes.
Transfer pork chop to prepared rack and let rest, turning often to ensure juices are evenly distributed, for 15 minutes. Cut pork from bones, slice, and sprinkle with sea salt.

panquemado-or-valencian-panquemao-tradit.name: Panquemado Or Valencian Panquemao (traditional Easter Recipe)
panquemado-or-valencian-panquemao-tradit.original_name: Panquemado o Panquemao valenciano (receta tradicional de Semana Santa)

ingredients.item: 65 ml de aceite de oliva suave

instructions: We crumple the leaven with tibia milk and we mix with a fork till it's mixed with milk and there's no Reserve Glow.
We bawl the eggs with the sugar till they triple their volume and become spongy.

We cut the orange and lemon fringes into very small pieces (we can also fringes) while considering that we do not have the white part of the skin because this bitter. We mix the orange and lemon fringes with olive oil, we mix well. Let's get the oil, orange, lemon and salt mixed into the bowl where we have the eggs with the sugar and we mix well till there's no lumps.
Below we added the mixture of milk and yeast we had reserved and we mixed everything back well.

Finally we add the flour little by little, amassed well and formed a ball. We let the dough stand in a bowl covered with film paper or a kitchen cloth far from currents, until its volume double. About 2 hours.

After time we amassed to remove the gas that has been produced inside and we re-form a ball, we leave the ball of mass onto the oven plate that we will have prepared with baking paper. We let another two hours rest.

We purify the oven at 180 degrees, heat up and down. With a knife we form a cross into the panquemao, we beat an egg and we brush with a beaten egg. We put sugar into a bowl and we'll put some water droplets in the sugar Rewind with a spoon and sprinkle the panquemao with sugar. We have been in the oven for 25 minutes at 180 degrees, heat up and down. The time's guiding. After time we remove the panquemao from the oven and let them stand on a grid.

papaya-juice-pequerecetas.name: Papaya Juice

ingredients.item: 200 ml cold water (can be adjusted as necessary)
The 1 lime or half lemon juice (optional but better)
1 teaspoon of honey or an agave syrup (optional if the papaya isn't very sweet)
4-5 ice cubes (optional, to serve well cold)

instructions: Pelamos la papaya, la partimos por la mitad y quitamos las semillas con una cuchara.
Cortamos la pulpa en trozos y la pasamos al vaso de la batidora junto con el agua.
We add lime juice and honey if necessary and we shredded everything up to get a very fine milkshake.
Probamos el punto de acidez y dulzor y ajustamos si es necesario.
Servimos en vasos altos con hielo, o guardamos en la nevera si no lo vamos a tomar al momento

pasta-salad-with-tuna-and-cheese-pequere.name: Pasta Salad With Tuna And Cheese
pasta-salad-with-tuna-and-cheese-pequere.original_name: Ensalada de lacitos de pasta con atún y queso

ingredients.item: 80 g of fresh cheese or goat's cheese in cubes (approx. zo cup)
4 tablespoons of baked sweet corn (about 60 g)
2 huevos de codorniz cocidos (o 1 huevo de gallina)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Cocemos los lacitos de pasta en abundante agua con sal, siguiendo el tiempo indicado por el fabricante para que queden al dente (unos 8-10 minutos). Escurrimos y dejamos enfriar completamente.
While the dough gets cold, we cook the codorniz eggs for 4 minutes in boiling water.
We put them through cold water and fight them with care.
We cut cherry tomatoes in half and fresh cheese into small cubes.

We mix cold pasta with scented and demoted tuna, tomatoes, corn and cheese into a big bowl. We add half or half-cut baked eggs. We scold with salt, olive oil and vinegar if we like with a more acid touch.

pasta-souffle-argiro.name: Pasta Souffle
instructions: We start by boiling the pens in salted water for 7 minutes.
Once the pens boil, we drain them.
Until the pasta boils, we make the cream.

pasta-with-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Pasta With Chicken
instructions: Deite um pouco de azeite num tacho grande, junte a cebola e os alhos, previamente picados, e deixe refogar.

Adicione, de seguida, o tomate e o vinho branco e deixe cozinhar um pouco. Acrescente depois o frango e deixe cozinhar por cerca de 10 a 15 minutos, mexendo de vez em quando. Tempere com sal e pimenta.
Junte o caldo de carne, as ervilhas e a massa meada, envolva bem e deixe cozinhar durante cerca de 8 minutos. No final, retifique os temperos e sirva quente.

paste-flora-argiro.name: Paste Flora

ingredients.item: 500 grams of strawberry or jam of your liking
500 grams of strawberry or jam of your liking

instructions: We'll use a form or shallow pan with a diameter of 23 cm.
In the mixer's bowl with the cutters, add the flour, sugar, salt and mix.
Add the cold butter cut into pieces and with a cut-off movement let the mixture become like wet sand.
In a bowl, beat the egg, yolk, lemon zest and vanilla with a fork.
Add the egg mixture to the solid materials.
Once they're joined in dough, stop the mixer.
By hand, combine the ingredients into dough.
Press the dough between the palms to become a plate, wrap it with membrane and refrigerate for at least 30′ to fighten and freeze.
Preheat the evening to 1703

patis-spinach-and-boysenberry-salad.name: Pati's Spinach And Boysenberry Salad
instructions: Make the dressing by combining the olive oil, horseradish, rice vinegar, brown sugar, and boysenberry jam in a blender. Blend until smooth.
Place the spinach in a large bowl. Drizzle the dressing over the spinach and toss until leaves are evenly coated. Sprinkle boysenberries and almonds over top of the salad; serve immediately.

patriotic-red-white-and-blue-fruit-salad.name: Patriotic Red, White, And Blue Fruit Salad
instructions: Combine blueberries, raspberries, and blackberries in a bowl; mix gently. Top with marshmallows; stir in if desired. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

pea-soup-argiro.name: Pea Soup

ingredients.item: 2 fresh onions with their leaves chopped
2 fresh onions with their leaves chopped

instructions: Heat in a small pot and heat the olive oil and butter and sauce the onion (dry and fresh) for 3–4 minutes to soften.
Add the garlic, sauté for 1 minute to remove the aroma and remove it.
Add the frozen frozen peas, mint and broth.
Leave the soap on heat for 5 minutes after building – no more so that the season doesn't lose its bright green color.
We make the materials with rhableder. If you want the soup more thin, add some water.
Add salt and pepper and mix.
Serve the soup at room temperature with one tablespoon of cream cheese or yogurt on each plate, a few drops of olive oil and mint leaves.

peanut-butter-fudge-with-evaporated-milk.name: Peanut Butter Fudge With Evaporated Milk
instructions: Butter a 9x13-inch pan.
Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium-high heat. Add evaporated milk and sugar. Bring to a rapid boil. Stir and boil for 7 minutes.
Remove from heat. Add peanut butter and marshmallow cream and stir until completely blended. Pour into the prepared pan and refrigerate until set, 1 to 2 hours. Cut into squares.

peanut-butter-swirl-boxed-brownies.name: Peanut Butter Swirl Boxed Brownies
instructions: Swirl peanut butter into brownie batter and bake according to package instructions.
Slice and serve.
Enjoy!

pear-brandy-sidecar.name: Pear Brandy Sidecar
instructions: Pour the brandy, lemon juice, simple syrup, and pear nectar into a cocktail shaker over ice.
Cover, and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted.
Strain into a chilled martini glass to serve.

pecan-bourbon-and-butterscotch-bread-pud.name: Pecan, Bourbon, And Butterscotch Bread Pudding
instructions: Bring brown sugar, corn syrup, butter, and salt to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, whisking to dissolve sugar. Boil until mixture is syrupy and measures 1 1/2 cups, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat; add cream and bourbon, if desired, and stir until smooth. Let cool. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool completely, cover, and chill. Rewarm before serving.

Toss bread, melted butter, and 2 tablespoons sugar in a large bowl and set aside. Using an electric mixer, beat eggs and remaining 1 1/2 cups sugar in another large bowl until pale yellow and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add cream, poppy seeds, and salt; beat to blend. Place bourbon in a small bowl; scrape in seeds from vanilla bean (reserve bean for another use). Whisk to distribute seeds, then add to egg mixture, whisking to blend well. Pour egg mixture over bread mixture in bowl. Add pecans and toss to coat well. Transfer mixture to a 13x9x2” glass or ceramic baking dish, spreading out in an even layer. Cover with plastic wrap and chill overnight.
Preheat oven to 325°. Remove plastic wrap and bake until top is browned in spots and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, 1 1/4–1 1/2 hours. Serve bread pudding with butterscotch sauce.

penne-with-vegetables-and-feta-cream-arg.name: Penne With Vegetables And Feta Cream
penne-with-vegetables-and-feta-cream-arg.original_name: Πένες με λαχανικά και κρέμα φέτας
instructions: Wash and drain the vegetables first.
Cut them into a frame of 1.5 cm for the vegetable pens. Leave the onions on the side for later.
Preheat the evening to 200°C in the air. We'll fly on the middle grill.
Adrift the eggplant, peppers and pumpkins on a large sheet. Don't cover each other.
Salt and sprinkle with 2 to 3 tablespoons of total olive oil.
Mix the vegetables and make them in a well preheated evening at 2003 Set them aside to cool.
Add the remaining olive oil to a wide pot.
Add the onions cut into small frames and sauce for 4 to 5 minutes without color. Just soften up.
Add the onions with vinegar and add the raisins.
Allow the vinegar with onions and raisins to thicken for 4 to 5 minutes.
We withdraw from the fire.
Add the cooked vegetables and salt and pepper at will.
Mix carefully not to melt the cooked vegetables. Let it cool well. At this stage we keep vegetables in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Boil the pens for as long as they are in the package and drain.
Wash them under cold water so that the starch leaves and the pasta doesn't stick together.
Drain well and add them to a large bowl.
Add the vegetables with all the liquids and mix.
Divide the dishes and serve the pens at room temperature by pouring the feta cream.
Garnish each dish with some balsamic cream.

pennes-amatriciana-argiro.name: Pennes Amatriciana
instructions: Finely chop first with a knife, the panceta.
Heat the olive oil and brown it.
We take it out on absorbent paper.
Add the chopped onion and pepper.
Add the ground tomatoes.
Boil for 6-7 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Add the chopped tomatoes, add salt and pepper and add the panceta.
Boil the pasta, drain them (keep some of their water) and add them to the sauce. If necessary, dilute with some of the pasta water.
Sprinkle the pens with cheese and basil finely chopped.

peppered-butter-and-pear-toast.name: Peppered Butter And Pear Toast
instructions: 1. Season room-temperature butter with cracked black pepper.
2. Spread toasted thin whole grain bread with pepper butter and top with thinly sliced pear.
3. Sprinkle with bee pollen (if desired) and flaky sea salt.

pesto-genovese-authentic-italian-basil-p.name: Pesto Genovese (authentic Italian Basil Pesto)
instructions: Crush garlic using a mortar and pestle. Add pine nuts; crush with the garlic. Add basil leaves gradually, making circular movements with the pestle, until a smooth paste forms.
Mix Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and pecorino Romano cheese using a wooden spoon. Stir in olive oil until pesto is blended.

pesto-stuffed-chicken.name: Pesto-stuffed Chicken
instructions: On a cutting board, salt and pepper both sides of each chicken breast with approximately ½ teaspoon salt and ½ teaspoon pepper, per side.
Slice each chicken breast horizontally along the side to create a pocket for the filling.

Stuff each breast with approximately one third of mozzarella cheese, one tablespoon pesto and four sundried tomatoes. If the chicken breast does not close fully with the filling, try securing with a wooden toothpick.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Pan fry for about 5-8 minutes, per side, depending on the size of the chicken breasts, until the cheese is melted and the chicken is cooked through. Serve warm.
Enjoy!

philadelphia-7-layer-mexican-dip.name: Philadelphia® 7-layer Mexican Dip

ingredients.item: Taco bell® home originals® taco seasoning mix
Taco bell® home originals® thick 'n chunky salsa

instructions: Mix cream cheese and seasoning mix until blended; spread onto serving plate or bottom of pie plate.
Top with remaining ingredients.
Refrigerate several hours or until chilled.

philly-tortilla-roll-ups.name: Philly Tortilla Roll-ups
instructions: Mix cream cheese spread and dressing in medium bowl until blended. Stir in vegetables. Spread onto tortillas; roll up tightly.
Wrap individually in plastic wrap. Refrigerate 1 hour.
Unwrap roll-ups; trim and discard ends. Cut each roll-up into 6 diagonal slices.

picadillo-toast-recipe-comedera.name: Picadillo Toast Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 kg de carne molida de res o picadillo
1/2 taza de pasta o concentrado de tomate
1 cdite of sweet or paprika pimenton

instructions: Peel onion and garlic teeth and cut into small notebooks. Do the same with your pepper and your tomato.
Retire the seeds and veins of Jalapeno chili and filet finely.
Warm up a pint with olive oil and sock garlic and onion teeth for 3 minutes.
Incorporates the pepper and jalapeno chili, pits for another 2 minutes.
Agrega la carne de res molida o el picadillo. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto. Mezcla y saltea a fuego medio por 7 minutos.
Add the cumin, paprika, and tomato sauce or concentrate. Meg and cook for 10 minutes on low heat until juicy.
When the meat is cooked and juicy, turn off and let some rest.
Deshace el queso fresco con las manos y trocea el perejil.
Add your favorite portion of cheesebes to toast and scatter with fresh cheese and cut parsley.
They'll be ready to taste.
Enjoy!

pickled-veggies.name: Pickled Veggies

ingredients.prep: of your choice, such as cucumber, onion, carrot, and/or beet
of your choice, such as mustard seeds, black peppercorns, fennel seeds, and/or sliced fresh ginger to taste

instructions: Cut the vegetables into the shapes of your choosing.
Fill the jars with vegetables, leaving ½ inch (1 cm) of space at the top.
Add spices of choice to the jars with the vegetables. We like plain beets, cucumbers with mustard seeds and peppercorns, carrots with ginger and fennel seeds, and red onion with peppercorns.
In a medium pot over high heat, combine the water, vinegar, sugar, and salt. Stir until the sugar and salt dissolve. Bring to a boil.
Once boiling, remove the brine from the heat and pour into the jars. Tap the jars against the counter to release any bubbles.
Close the jars and allow to cool completely at room temperature.
Refrigerate the jars for 48 hours before eating the pickles. Store for up to 1 week in a refrigerator.
Enjoy!

pina-colada-fruit-jellies.name: Pina Colada Fruit Jellies
instructions: Spray an 8x8-inch baking dish with non-fat cooking spray. Place dish in refrigerator.
Combine granulated sugar, applesauce, pineapple-flavored gelatin, unflavored gelatin, lime juice, and coconut extract in saucepan.

Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly. Boil for about 1 minute. Remove saucepan from heat, and cool at room temperature for about 10 minutes. (Do not pour boiling hot liquid into a chilled glass dish.)
Remove baking dish from refrigerator, and pour warm mixture into the cooled baking dish. Refrigerate until firm, 1 to 2 hours.
When firm, remove from refrigerator, lift one side with a spatula, and turn out onto a cutting board or parchment paper sprinkled with granulated sugar.
Using a sharp knife, cut gelatin into squares or use a small cookie cutter for decorative shapes. Coat the jellies on all sides with sugar. Place on a rack, and allow to dry overnight.
Store in an airtight container.

pina-colada-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Pina Colada Ice Cream

ingredients.item: Fresh pineapples and dehydrated coconut chips to decorate

instructions: Cut the pineapple into cubes and lie in a blender. Add the other ingredients and crush until homogeneous.
Lay the preparation in a container and take it to the freezer for a few hours, so that it stays very firm. Serve ice cream on balls, decorated with fresh pineapple and dehydrated coconut chips.

pineapple-carrot-smoothie.name: Pineapple Carrot Smoothie
instructions: Place banana, pineapple, carrot, hemp seeds, ginger, orange zest, cinnamon, coconut milk, and water in a blender in the order listed; blend on high until creamy and smooth.

plum-and-mascarpone-pie.name: Plum And Mascarpone Pie

ingredients.prep: homemade or store-bought (click for homemade crust recipe)

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Line pie dish with crust; crimp edges. Fully bake pie crust according to recipe or box instructions.

Place plums in a large bowl; add 1 1/2 cups sugar and lemon juice. Scrape in seeds from half of vanilla bean; toss to coat. Divide plum mixture between two 13x9x2" glass baking dishes, arranging plums cut side down and overlapping slightly. Roast until juices are bubbling and slightly thickened and plums are tender but not falling apart, 40–60 minutes (cooking time will depend on ripeness of plums). Let cool slightly.

Using a slotted spatula, transfer plums to a rimmed baking sheet. Cover loosely with plastic wrap; chill. Pour juices in baking dishes into a small saucepan. Bring to a boil and simmer until thickened and reduced to a scant 1/2 cup, 4–5 minutes; set glaze aside.

Combine remaining 2 Tbsp. sugar, mascarpone, crème fraîche, and honey in a medium bowl. Scrape in seeds from remaining half vanilla bean. Using an electric mixer, beat on high speed until mixture holds firm peaks (do not overbeat or mascarpone may curdle). DO AHEAD: Plums, glaze, and mascarpone cream can be made 1 day ahead. Cover separately and chill.

Spread mascarpone cream evenly over bottom of crust. Arrange some chilled plum halves tightly (but not overlapping) in a single layer over mascarpone mixture. Starting at edges of pie crust, arrange remaining plum halves on top of base layer, overlapping tightly and forming a spiral to cover. Pie should dome slightly in the center.
Using a pastry brush, spread some of glaze over plums (if glaze has firmed up, gently reheat, adding 1 Tbsp. water and whisking to blend).
Cut pie into slices. Top with whipped cream and drizzle with more plum syrup.

pork-gyoza.name: Pork Gyoza
instructions: Combine ground pork, cabbage, egg, spring onions, 1 tablespoon soy sauce, sake, mirin, and ginger in a large bowl; mix well.

Place approximately 1 to 2 teaspoons of the pork mixture in the center of each gyoza wrapper. Moisten your fingers with water and rub around the edges of each wrapper. Fold wrappers in half over filling, creating a semi circle. Take one side of the wrapper and make crimps along the edges for a decorative pattern (like pleats of a skirt) and press along the edges to seal the two sides together. Ensure there isn't much excess air caught inside the dumpling. Repeat until all the pork mixture is used.

Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Place as many gyoza in the skillet as fit in a single layer and fry until the bottom is browned, about 3 to 5 minutes. Add water to skillet and reduce heat. Cover and allow gyoza to steam until all the water has evaporated, about 5 minutes. Repeat with the remaining gyoza.
Mix rice vinegar and soy sauce together for a dipping sauce and serve with the gyoza.

pork-loin-chalupas-recipe-comedera.name: Pork Loin Chalupas Recipe
pork-loin-chalupas-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de chalupas de lomo de cerdo
instructions: In a pot, add pork, water to cover, a garlic tooth and ½ onion over medium heat. Let them cook for 40 minutes or till the meat's well cooked.
Saca el pollo de la olla y desmenuza. Reserva.
Add to the blender, green steaks, jalapeno chilies, onion, garlic, cilantro and salt to taste. Lica till the ingredients are well incorporated. Reserve.

In another pot, place the red tomatoes and guajillo chilies, let them boil for 4 minutes and add to the blender with a garlic tooth and come out to taste. Lica till the ingredients are well incorporated. Reserve
In an oil frying pan, put the tortillas for a few seconds till it lays some light on both sides and removes into a napkin to remove excess oil. That's how with all the omelette

pork-wine-with-celeriac-argiro.name: Pork Wine With Celeriac

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg of pork cut into ports
11⁄2 kg of green cut into pieces of 5 cm.
11⁄2 kg of pork cut into ports
11⁄2 kg of green cut into pieces of 5 cm.

instructions: Dry the pork well with absorbent paper.
Clean and wash the leeks, then cut them into large pieces.
Clean and wash the celery and cut it into thick pieces.
In a pot heat the olive oil and add the meat ports on all sides for 6–7 minutes.
Add the wine and let the alcohol evaporate.
Add a glass of water, cover the pot, lower the heat and simmer for about 45 minutes, until the pork is almost ready.
Add the chopped leeks, tomatoes and celery. Salt and pepper.
Continue cooking for about 30 minutes, until the meat softens well and stays with some honeyed sauce.

pota-rice-with-chorizo-teleculinaria.name: Pota Rice With Chorizo
instructions: Peel and pinch garlic teeth; peel and cut the onion into half-moons. Take the mild fire a pot with the butter and let it melt. Add the onion and garlic and saute until the onion becomes soft.
Add the sausage, cut into slices, and the pot cubes, stir and water with white wine. When alcohol evaporates, add the tomato and let it cook, stirring from time to time for 5 minutes.
Junte o caldo de peixe e, quando levantar fervura, adicione o arroz, tempere com sal e pimenta e deixe cozinhar, por cerca de 10 a 15 minutos. Sirva polvilhado com coentros picados.

potato-croquette-faces-a-recipe-for-chil.name: Potato Croquette Faces: A Recipe For Children
potato-croquette-faces-a-recipe-for-chil.original_name: Caritas de croquetas de papas: una receta para niños
instructions: In a big pot, boils the potatoes in abundant water with a pint of salt over medium heat. Cooking for about 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender after pinching with a fork. Listen to them and let them cool slightly.

In a big bowl, pat the potatoes up to a smooth purée. It incorporates an egg, a grated cheese, a flour, a corn starch, a frosted bread and an garlic powder if you are using it. Mix up to gain a homogenous and manageable mass.

With your hands, take portions of the dough and form small pancakes. Put them on baking paper. Using a toothstick, create his face by tipping his eyes and mouth with softness. Repeat the process with the whole mass.

Take his face to the freezer for 15 minutes. That step's key to keeping them shape while cooking. Warm abundant oil in a frying pan with medium-high heat. Fry the faces in tands, dying them both sides for 4-5 minutes. Put them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
He's with his pat croquette face with your favorite sauce. Enjoy!

instructions: 1. Peel the peel of potatoes and slice it in the ring form.
2. Heat the olive oil in the pan and fry potatoes slices.
3. Peel the bark of onions and off.

instructions: 1. Roast the onion and the yellowish olive oil, which you eat, until the onions are transparent.
2. Add dried tomatoes and cook salt, pepper and tomatoes until softened.
3. Mix cheeses in a large bowl.
4. Take the bread dough into four equal cloths and open every bezeyi in 20 cm with the help of a roller.

prairie-pate.name: Prairie Paté
instructions: Coat a 13x9x2-inch pan and the back of a rubber spatula with nonstick spray. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat. Add marshmallows and honey and cook, stirring constantly, until marshmallows are melted.
Add protein powder and stir until smooth. Off heat, fold in oats, sunflower seeds, nuts, cranberries, and pork cracklin's. Working quickly, stir to combine.
Quickly transfer to prepared pan; press into an even layer with spatula. Let cool until set, about 30 minutes. Cut into 12 bars.

prepare-a-delicious-cajun-style-stuffed-.name: Prepare A Delicious Cajun-style Stuffed Turkey
prepare-a-delicious-cajun-style-stuffed-.original_name: Prepara un rico pavo relleno estilo cajún

ingredients.item: 500 ml de caldo de pollo o vegetal

instructions: In a bowl, mix all spices (paprika, cayenne, garlic powder, etc.) with olive oil to form an aromatic paste.
Divide la mezcla en dos partes: una para rellenar el pavo y otra para sazonar la piel.
Con cuidado, separa la piel del pavo de la carne usando tus manos o una cuchara. Unta la mantequilla mezclada con ajo machacado debajo de la piel, especialmente en la pechuga y los muslos.
It puts into the turkey cavity the cuts of lemon, onion and fresh herbs.
Add half of the box mix directly into the turkey so that the taste impregnates the meat from inside.
Unite the remaining mixture of cajun spices throughout the outside of the turkey, making sure to cover it well to form a tasty cape.
It purifies the oven to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3).
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja para hornear con rejilla, vierte el caldo de pollo y el vino blanco en el fondo de la bandeja.
Baked the turkey covered with aluminium paper for the first 2 hours and sprinkled every 30 minutes with plate juices.
Remove the paper and continue baking for 1 hour or until the skin is golden and crispy. Use a kitchen thermometer to check that internal temperature will reach 75-3-3 (74-3).
Una vez listo, deja reposar el pavo por 30 minutos antes de cortarlo. Esto permite que los jugos se redistribuyan.
Sirve caliente y disfruta.

prepare-a-juicy-roman-style-ossobuco-ste.name: Prepare A Juicy Roman-style Ossobuco Step By Step
prepare-a-juicy-roman-style-ossobuco-ste.original_name: Prepara paso a paso un jugoso osobuco a la romana

ingredients.item: 2  piezas de osobuco de ternera ((aprox. 350 g cada una))
2 cdas de harina de trigo para rebozar
2 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
200 ml de caldo de carne casero o bajo en sodio

instructions: Secar bien las piezas de osobuco y salpimentarlas. Pasarlas por harina sacudiendo el exceso.
En una cazuela ancha y pesada, calentar el aceite de oliva y dorar los osobucos por ambos lados hasta que queden bien sellados. Retirar y reservar.
In the same casserole, drink the onion, celery, carrot and garlic with medium heat till they are tender and frail.
Deglasar con el vino blanco, rascando el fondo para recuperar los jugos caramelizados. Dejar reducir 3 minutos.
Incorporar los tomates triturados, el laurel, el romero, el tomillo y volver a colocar las piezas de carne.
Add the broth, cover and let them cook with low heat for 1 hour and 30 minutes, or till the flesh's so tender that it gets out of the bone.
Retilate salt and pepper, remove the herbs and add a pint of lemon pint to give freshness to the stew.
Serve hot with creamy polenta or a simple white risotto.

prepare-grilled-sea-bass-with-garlic-and.name: Prepare Grilled Sea Bass With Garlic And Parsley Marinade
prepare-grilled-sea-bass-with-garlic-and.original_name: Prepara robalo a la parilla con marinada de ajo y perejil
instructions: Clean up with scales and viscesas your two pieces of steal and lava very well to remove any other blood.
Once they are clear and drained, make some skin cuts to suit them.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Drop the butter and put into a bowl. Also add olive oil.
Peel his teeth with garlic and steak very well. You can shredder that as well.
Lava muy bien el perejil, escurre y trocea finamente.
Agrega el ajo y el perejil en el recipiente. Incorpora las hierbas provenzales, un poco de sal y pimienta. Mezcla muy bien hasta que se forme una pasta.
Con esa pasta vas a aderezar el pescado por ambos lados y por las aberturas que hiciste.
Deja marinar por unos 30 minutos.
Cuando se vaya terminando el tiempo de marinado, prepara tu parrillera o barbacoa.
When your grill's hot, stick the fish from 7 to 10 minutes from each side or till it's cooked.
Once ready, join with whatever garrison you wish. Enjoy!

prepare-mote-rascal-step-by-step-comeder.name: Prepare Mote Rascal, Step By Step
prepare-mote-rascal-step-by-step-comeder.original_name: Prepara mote pillo, paso a paso

Later, you will add crushed garlic teeth and onion and scattering for 3 minutes until they are soft.
Ahora, agrega el mote, la sal al gusto y el achiote. Mezcla y deja cocinar por 3 minutos.
It's time for you to get your milk and cook till it evapors and the mote impregnates from all the fluids.
While cooking, beat your eggs into a small bowl till they are sparkling.
Add them to the casserole and cook them up. For about 5 minutes.
Finished with cooking, serve and taste.
Enjoy!

prepare-this-delicious-burrito-for-break.name: Prepare This Delicious Burrito For Breakfast
prepare-this-delicious-burrito-for-break.original_name: Prepara este delicioso burrito para el desayuno
instructions: Pela la cebolla y corta en cuadritos. Reserva.
Warm up a frying pan and pour the bacon strips till they get crispy.
In the same frying pan where you cook the bacon, melt the spoons of butter.
Fry the onion for two minutes. Incorporate eggs, salt and pepper to taste. Mix and cook till smooth and juicy.
Pela el aguacate y corta en rebanadas. Sazona con un poco de sal
At the centre of the omelette, put the mozzarella cheese plate and crispy bacon strips.
Add some egg and some avocado cuts.
Enrolla muy bien y sella un poco para que la tortilla quede tostada.
Corta a la mitad y disfruta.

pumpkin-and-parmesan-soup-teleculinaria.name: Pumpkin And Parmesan Soup

ingredients.item: 60 g g g grated parmesan cheese
Parmesan cheese, cream and pumpkin seeds to decorate

instructions: Peel the pumpkin, cut it into cubes, dispose of it on a tray, water with olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Take it in the oven, preheated at 160°C, for about 40 minutes.
After that time, transfer the pumpkin to a pot, add the cream and milk, crush very well with the magic wand and light the light.
Add the parmesan cheese, let it melt and season with salt and pepper. Check the consistency of the soup and, if necessary, add more cream or milk.
Serve sprinkled with more parmesan cheese, watered with a cream yarn and decorated with pumpkin seeds.
